samples.text: All metals are chemical elements. A copper is a metal. Therefore, is a copper a chemical element?
Every metal belongs to the category of chemical elements. A copper is classified as a metal. Does this mean a copper is a chemical element?
All metallic elements are chemical elements. A refined copper is a metallic element. Therefore, is a refined copper a chemical element?
A copper belongs to the group of metals. The group of metals falls under chemical elements. Based on this, is a copper a chemical element?
All metals are chemical elements. A copper is a metal. This topic was discussed last week. Therefore, is a copper a chemical element?
